testimonials.title: What Our Guests Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real experiences from travelers around the world who explored the Aegean with us.

reviews.anna: An absolutely fantastic day at Ephesus! Our guide was incredibly knowledgeable and passionate. The small group made it feel like a private tour. Highly recommended for anyone docking in Kuşadası!
reviews.carlos: La excursión a Pamukkale fue increíble. El viaje es largo pero vale cada minuto. Las terrazas blancas son impresionantes y la piscina de Cleopatra fue el broche de oro. ¡Servicio excelente!
reviews.sarah: The boat trip was the highlight of our cruise holiday! Crystal clear waters, delicious lunch on board, and the crew were so welcoming. Perfect day out for the whole family.
reviews.markus: Wir haben die Ephesus-Tour zum dritten Mal gemacht und es war wieder großartig. Die Guides sind erstklassig und der Transport war pünktlich und komfortabel. Absolut empfehlenswert!
reviews.elena: Далянь и пляж с черепахами — это невероятное место! Грязевые ванны были очень забавными, а обед у реки просто восхитительный. Отличная организация от начала до конца.
reviews.james: Şirince was a hidden gem we almost missed! The wine tasting was excellent, the village breakfast was authentic, and the cobblestone streets were charming. Our guide made the experience truly special.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our tours and booking process.

booking.q: How do I book a tour?
booking.a: Simply choose your tour, select your preferred date, fill in your details and proceed to payment. You'll receive a confirmation email and WhatsApp message with all the details.

cancellation.a: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before the tour departure. Full refund guaranteed — no questions asked.

payment.q: What payment methods do you accept?
payment.a: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express) through our secure payment system. Cash payment is also available on the day of the tour.

languages.q: In which languages are tours available?
languages.a: We offer tours in English, German, Russian, Turkish, and more. Each tour listing shows available languages. Private tours can be arranged in additional languages upon request.

pickup.a: Most tours depart from Kuşadası Port entrance or Kuşadası Marina. The exact meeting point is specified on each tour page and in your confirmation email.

weather.a: Tours operate in most weather conditions. In case of extreme weather, we'll offer a full refund or reschedule to another date. We'll notify you 12 hours in advance.

children.a: Most of our tours are family-friendly! Children under 6 usually go free, and ages 6-12 receive a discount. Check each tour's important info section for specific age recommendations.

group.q: Can I book a private tour?
group.a: Absolutely! We offer private tours for families, couples, and groups. Contact us via WhatsApp for a custom quote tailored to your preferences and schedule.

privateExcursions.title: Your Private Shore Excursion
privateExcursions.subtitle: Tell us what you dream of — our specialists will craft a bespoke tour just for you. No crowds, no fixed itineraries, just your perfect day.

step1.title: What would you like to experience?
step1.subtitle: Select one or more — we'll design a day around your choices.

step2.title: Tell us more about your group
step2.subtitle: The more we know, the better we can tailor your experience.

step3.title: How can we reach you?
step3.subtitle: A dedicated tour specialist will contact you within 2 hours with a personalized proposal.

trust.title: No price surprises — ever.

success.title: Request Received!
